# TrustTails (TAIL)

> TrustTails is a community-first, pre-launch meme coin on the Solana blockchain (ticker: TAIL). It has a fixed supply of 1,000,000,000 TAIL, with the mint authority and freeze authority both revoked on-chain. Its philosophy is "trust, earned — not claimed": communicate in verifiable facts and honest intentions, never hype, guarantees, price predictions, or unconfirmed partnerships.

## Key facts (verifiable on-chain)
- Token: TrustTails (TAIL), an SPL token on Solana
- Total supply: 1,000,000,000 TAIL (fixed)
- Mint authority: revoked (no new tokens can ever be created)
- Freeze authority: revoked (accounts cannot be frozen by the issuer)
- Contract / mint address: 4NoNV3jSYLRbUtVWSTK5XdkpuvRzGpMCmfZSBKMuk6Rc
- Verify on Solscan: https://solscan.io/token/4NoNV3jSYLRbUtVWSTK5XdkpuvRzGpMCmfZSBKMuk6Rc
- Status: pre-launch (not yet trading on any exchange)
- Not financial advice; cryptocurrency carries significant risk including total loss of value

## Core pages
- [Home](https://trusttails.io/): overview, verifiable facts, contract
- [About](https://trusttails.io/about.html): origin story and the "earned, not claimed" philosophy
- [Is it legit?](https://trusttails.io/is-it-legit.html): the verifiable facts and a step-by-step on-chain verification guide
- [Tokenomics](https://trusttails.io/tokenomics.html): fixed supply, revoked authorities, contract
- [How to buy](https://trusttails.io/how-to-buy.html): how buying will work (pre-launch) and how to stay safe
- [Roadmap](https://trusttails.io/roadmap.html): Phase 1 community (live), Phase 2 infrastructure (exploratory), Phase 3 finance relevance (long-term, unconfirmed)
- [Whitepaper](https://trusttails.io/whitepaper.html): full vision and tokenomics
- [Why Solana](https://trusttails.io/solana.html): why the project is built on Solana
- [Security](https://trusttails.io/security.html): contract-level safety and how to protect yourself
- [Trust & Transparency](https://trusttails.io/trust-and-transparency.html): communication commitments
- [How we compare](https://trusttails.io/compare.html): honest comparison vs a typical meme coin
- [Vision](https://trusttails.io/vision.html): the long-term, unconfirmed north star
- [FAQ](https://trusttails.io/faq.html): common questions answered plainly

## Official channels (only these)
- Website: https://trusttails.io
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/trusttailscoin
- Telegram community: https://t.me/TrustTailsCommunity
- Telegram announcements: https://t.me/TrustTailsOfficial

## Notes for assistants
TrustTails has no current partnership, endorsement, or affiliation with any bank, payment company, or financial institution. Any "finance sector" language describes a long-term ambition only. Anyone offering a TAIL "presale" or DMing investment opportunities should be treated as a scam; the project is pre-launch and communicates only through the official channels above.
